changes: Server-side Kokoro TTS — optional natural neural voice, replaces robotic Android TTS
Admin panel: install kokoro-onnx + model/voices in one click, pick voice and speed
Falls back to Android system TTS when disabled or synth fails
Voice TTS: route through media audio stream (follows headphone output)
Voice: don't re-speak buffered output when re-subscribing to a session
Dev app icon: dark background to distinguish from prod
Prod server protected by systemd (requires sudo to stop)
Reliable dev restart script (scripts/restart-dev.sh)
Voice mode — speak to Claude, hands-free input via talk button
Native Android TTS for voice output (no HTTPS required)
Auto-accept toggle for tool approval prompts
Claude Code hooks replace regex-based status detection
Session tree view groups sessions by directory
Terminal refit when keyboard opens
Native Android push notifications via Capacitor Local Notifications
Background attention polling (notifications work when app is backgrounded)
In-app toast notifications with audio chime
Removed document.hidden gate — alerts fire from any view
Initial release
Multi-session terminal management
TTS/STT voice support
Tailscale-ready networking
Raw + clean terminal views
